availability_text: Only 13 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Daily protection: The Carefree Panty Liners are 100% air-breathable with fresh scent and contain cotton extract to provide the best protection and comfort every day, ensuring you feel fresh
Air-flow liner: The cotton knicker liners feature a unique combination of 4 airflow layers that allow maximum breathability to keep you fresh and comfortable for longer throughout the day
Soft cotton cover: The dermatologically-tested cotton cover of the Carefree discreet liners is soft and breathable and feels like cotton underwear, providing ultimate fresh protection
Long-lasting freshness: Designed to deliver freshness and daily underwear protection with an eight-hour odour control system, you can just forget about the incontinence liners and feel the freshness
Product details: Carefree Cotton Feel Fresh Scent Panty Liners (1x Pack of 20), breathable panty liners with cotton extract for fresh underwear protection and intimate hygiene
description: Product Description " Carefree Cotton Feel Fresh Scent Panty Liners (1x Pack of 20) - Soft and Breathable for Long-Lasting Freshness Whether you're busy with work, having a great night, or travelling, the Carefree Panty Liners make sure to keep you feeling fresh throughout the day. Developed with a unique combination of 4 airflow layers that allow maximum breathability, these cotton panty liners are 100% breathable, ensuring a soft feel and ultimate comfort. Their dermatologically-tested cotton cover feels as gentle as cotton underwear, providing a comfortable feeling every day. Their eight-hour odour control system offers long-lasting freshness so you can simply embrace the day! Usage instructions: Wash and dry your hands with soap and water. Remove the Carefree panty liner from the wrapper, and peel off the long piece of paper that covers the sticky back of the liner. Place the liner sticky side down to cover the crotch panel of your underwear — the area that goes between your legs. Dispose of the panty liner after it has become saturated. Pull it off your undies and roll it up like a sleeping bag in the wrapper from your fresh liner before disposing of it in the bin. Never flush panty liners down the toilet. Wash your hands. Product Benefits at a Glance: Carefree Panty Liners 100% breathable With cotton extract for soft feel 4 airflow layers for longer freshness 1 x Pack of 20 Carefree Pantyliners Fresh Scent " Ingredients Soft cover (synthetic fibers), transfer layer (synthetic fibers), absorbent layer (cellulosic fibers, synthetic fibers and super absorbent polymers), barrier material (synthetic fibers), paper with silicon coating, adhesive, perfume. For some variants pouch (synthetic polymers) Directions 1. Remove the panty liner from its packaging. 2. Place the panty liner inside your underwear. 3. Dispose of the used panty liner properly and replace it with a new one as needed. Safety Warning For external use only. Box Contains 1 x Carefree with Cotton Extract Fresh Breathable, 20 Pantyliners Manufacturer Contact Information Foundation Park Roxborough Way Berks Sl6 3Ug See more
